title: Rigetti QCS Reservation
description: A time-boxed exclusive access window to a Rigetti quantum processor (QPU) granted to a user or group. Derived from the Rigetti QCS HTTP API reservation surface.

quantumProcessorId.description: The QPU this reservation is scoped to (e.g. Aspen-M-3, Ankaa-2, Cepheus-1-108Q).

userId.description: QCS user that owns the reservation. Mutually exclusive with groupName at the API level (one or the other).

groupName.description: QCS group the reservation is billed against, if group-scoped.

duration.description: Duration of the reservation (e.g. PT30M). Computed server-side from start/end.

price.description: Reservation price reference; populated against the user/group's contract pricing.
